sections_cited: section 25 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7373 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.32378/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.01.2025 Mr. Yousuf Ali, advocate for the petitioner. Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Counsel for the petitioner points out that this is a case of audit selection per section 25 of the Sales Tax Act and it has been issued in the manner that offends Division Bench judgment of this court reported as 2023 PTD 576. Counsel for the respondent states that this matter is covered under the aforesaid judgment and there is no cavil if the petition is disposed of in mutatis mutandis application thereof. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
